title: Towns & Nations
description: A role-playing Minecraft plugin for immersive town creation, alliances, and warfare
body:
![Towns and Nations header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/365166025dd56b1ee24d1b04f34fd3974d2af749_0.webp)
### Do not forgot to download the mandatory dependencies

Towns & Nations is a Minecraft plugin designed to provide players with an immersive role-playing experience. It enables the creation of towns, management of land claims, establishment of alliances, and the orchestration of wars and betrayals.

Main characteristics:
- Role creation and management
- Chunk protection
- Roleplay features (alliance, war, embargo...)
- Economy system (can be merged/disabeld with vault)
- Tax, chunk upkeep, salaries and upgrades
- Complete GUI
- Highly configurable
- [Dynmap support](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-dynmap)
- [Squaremap support](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-squaremap)
- [Bluemap support](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-bluemap)
- [Pl3xmap support](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-pl3xmap)
- [DiscordSrv support](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-and-nations-discordsrv)
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Custom 3D private property (sell or rent property in your town)
- Wars (conquer chunks, subjugate territories...)
- Landmarks (Capture and hold to get daily items)

# Mandatory dependencies : 
- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
- [SphereLib](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spherelib)

![Bstat graph](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/TownsAndNations.svg)
